name: Cover Letter Generator
description: Triggers when a new job row is added to Google Sheets, generates a tailored cover letter using Groq LLaMA, creates a Google Doc, and saves the link back to the sheet

parameters.title: Cover Letter - {{ $('Google Sheets Trigger').item.json['Company'] }} - {{ $('Google Sheets Trigger').item.json['Position'] }}

nodes.name: Update Google Sheets - Save Doc Link

note: Import this workflow into n8n and update credentials before activating
